div.p: Visit the counter or ask a staff member to purchase a voucher. Vouchers are available in multiple time and speed plans to suit your needs.

Your session starts the moment you enter the voucher code. Time continues to count down whether you are browsing or not. Reconnecting on the same device within your plan's validity will resume your session automatically.
This voucher is active on another device. You can disconnect that device and connect here instead.
Pick the WiFi plan you want.
Review your order and choose how to pay.
How would you like to pay?
Tap to open your eWallet and complete payment.

div.div: Please go to the counter to pay.

div.p: Payment confirmed — your voucher is ready.
